function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-02-17
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-17                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file was updated with schema-compliant frontmatter and preserved body. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item; it was already read, satisfying delete-read discipline.
next_step.observation: Wrote updates to 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md successfully.

I processed the lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md, which explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter migration for exactly one invoice file. I followed workflow + schema docs, preserved full original body verbatim under frontmatter, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check passed (explicit single-file list). Numeric check: line totals validated from source (1*390=390, 2*110=220, 390+220=610) matching total_eur 610.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing the requested invoice frontmatter migration.

function.message: Completed the next inbox request: added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md using visible invoice data, preserved the original note body below frontmatter, and removed the processed inbox item 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-processing workflow, OCR/migration workflow, finance schema requirements, and file-migration discipline by preserving original body exactly below YAML frontmatter.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for one specified invoice file. The invoice note visibly contained all required invoice schema fields and line items, allowing a complete, evidence-based update. After successful write, inbox cleanup rule required deleting the processed inbox file.
